name: Kahlua Fantasy Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crushed chocolate wafers with the softened butter and sugar until combined.
2. Press the mixture into a greased springform pan to form the crust.
3. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
4. Remove from oven and let cool completely before adding filling and refrigerating.
